summary: Frontend-only iteration 3 verification PASSED. All 14 acceptance criteria from the v3 revision request are met: Trust Wedge added as case 01 with full copy, projected result label, pull-quote and expandable artifact panel (Positioning before/after + Provenance/Control/Verifiable pillars); Lahori Zeera completely removed (no testid, no '₹10', no 'lahori' text on page); Moxie image swapped to a Pexels brand-neutral asset (no '1556228720'); softened attribution language present on Luco/Moxie/Athena/JSS RESULT lines; Testimonial, POV (with Devanshi headshot) and Battlecard sections added in the correct position; Campaign Gallery now contains the 'trust beats speed.' poster and a populated Competitive teardown tile ('7 players · 1 unowned axis', 'Speed vs trust · positioning map'); Contact reads 'PMM, brand strategy, and founder-marketer roles' (no 'senior PMM'). Section ordering on page is exactly testimonial → work → pov → battlecard → gallery → contact. No console/page errors. All existing PORTFOLIO.* testIds (site-nav, hero-section, about-section, work-section, gallery-section, contact-section) still resolve.
critical_code_review_comments: SelectedWork.js is approaching 320 lines and bundles case data + 3 sub-components; consider extracting the cases array into a constants file and ArtifactPanel/Block into their own modules for maintainability if more cases get added.
Battlecard.js uses array index as React key for rows. Low risk here since rows are static, but switching to a stable key (e.g., r.you slug) is preferred.
POV.js hardcodes the headshot URL; consider moving the asset URL into a constants file alongside other portfolio assets so URL changes don't require touching component code.
ArtifactPanel uses grid-template-rows animation correctly with overflow-hidden — confirmed visually and via DOM inner_text after toggle. No issue.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 (v3 revision) fully validated against live preview https://pmm-portfolio-2.preview.emergentagent.com. Note for future testers: many labels (artifact panel headings, battlecard table headers, RESULT label) use CSS text-transform:uppercase, so playwright inner_text() returns UPPERCASE text — use .lower() / case-insensitive substring matches when asserting label text. The Trust Wedge ArtifactPanel content is hidden via grid-rows-[0fr] + overflow-hidden until the 'Artifact · Before / After Positioning' button is clicked; inner_text only returns its content after toggle. The CV download button intentionally alerts (placeholder) and the 'Made with Emergent' badge is platform-injected — do not flag.
